findings.description: Source mentions an alternative to getting SimpleDbTransactionManager from SystemRepository: directly injecting/setting it. The parenthetical note '（システムリポジトリから取得するのではなく、SimpleDbTransactionManager を設定して使用してもよい)' is not reflected in the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: （システムリポジトリから取得するのではなく、SimpleDbTransactionManager を設定して使用してもよい)

findings.description: PascalCase class `SystemRepository` appears in the Java implementation example in s8 but is absent from the hints array.
Property name `dbTransactionName` appears as a first-column entry in the knowledge file's own property table for SimpleDbTransactionManager configuration, but is absent from the hints array.
